name: Michael Lee
tagline: M.S. Analytics · Georgia Tech  ·  B.S. Information Science · UMD
bio: I build things end-to-end, from data pipelines to deployed SaaS products. I work best at the intersection of engineering, data, and business strategy. Background in USAF with a focus on data, federal, and defense roles.

projects.name: ReviewStar
projects.description: AI-powered behavioral interview coaching platform. Users practice STAR answers via mic or text and get per-section scores and rewrites from LLaMA 3.3 70B. Built with FastAPI, Next.js, Supabase, Google OAuth, and Stripe. Live at reviewstar.cv with Free and Pro ($9/mo) tiers.

projects.name: AWS IAM Lifecycle Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end IAM automation for joiner, mover, and leaver workflows. Handles MFA enforcement, least-privilege assignment, access reviews, and deprovisioning with full CloudTrail audit logging. Satisfies NIST 800-53 and CMMC Level 2 controls.

projects.name: AI Labor Market Risk Pipeline
projects.description: Data pipeline that quantifies AI-exposure risk against financial vulnerability across occupations. Ingests from BLS OEWS, Anthropic Economic Index, O*NET, and Census ACS PUMS into Snowflake with 43 dbt tests across staging to mart layers. Outputs a composite credit risk score per occupation.

projects.name: DoD Small Business Contract Pipeline
projects.description: ETL pipeline that pulls DoD small business contract data from USASpending.gov into PostgreSQL. Includes NAICS sector classification, deduplication, and a Streamlit dashboard with KPI cards, choropleth map, and sidebar filters. Extended to Azure Blob Storage and Azure SQL.

projects.name: Job Agent
projects.description: Automated job scraper targeting Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, and USAJobs. Claude API scores each listing against a resume and profile summary. Above-threshold results are delivered as a daily HTML email digest via Gmail.

projects.name: Crypto Spam Tracker
projects.description: Real-time monitor for crypto spam in YouTube comments. Polls the YouTube Comments API every 7 minutes, detects coin mentions with pattern matching, and stores results in SQLite. Includes a web dashboard with per-coin filtering and live price data.

projects.name: Game Sales Data Analysis
projects.description: Normalized MySQL relational database built from raw CSV game sales data. Six tables covering games, platforms, publishers, regions, and sales. SQL queries surface top titles and market trends by platform, region, and genre.

projects.name: iConsultancy: Nonprofit Data Analysis
projects.description: Consulting project for a nonprofit with inconsistent donor and pickup-request data. Cleaned multi-year datasets, built donor segmentation analysis, and delivered dashboards and presentations to leadership. Findings directly supported strategic planning decisions.

projects.name: Threat Intelligence Briefs
projects.description: Series of 10+ threat intelligence reports on real-world CVE incidents. Each brief maps adversary TTPs to MITRE ATT&CK and outlines mitigations aligned with NIST and federal guidance.

projects.name: Internet Systems Architecture & Simulation
projects.description: Full network architecture simulation in Cisco Packet Tracer. Configured IP, DHCP, NAT, DNS, HTTP servers, VPN tunnels, and RIP routing across a simulated enterprise topology with IPv4/IPv6 dual-stack and IoT integration.

projects.name: USG iSchool Chatbot
projects.description: Mid-project contribution to a university RAG-based chatbot. Worked with advisors, IT, and stakeholders to define success criteria; improved context structuring and moderated response quality through like/dislike feedback loops.

projects.name: Smart Pet Litter Box Redesign
projects.description: End-to-end product discovery for a smart litter box redesign. Conducted user research and competitive analysis, defined personas, built low-fidelity prototypes, and delivered a phased product roadmap with documented tradeoffs.
